channel.title: RBI Press Releases
channel.description: Reserve Bank of India press releases

item.title: Master Direction on Liquidity Risk Management — Amendment
item.description: RBI today amended Master Direction No. 2025-26/01 on liquidity risk management for NBFCs.

item.title: RBI to conduct VRRR auction on May 5, 2026
item.description: The Reserve Bank will conduct a 14-day Variable Rate Reverse Repo auction.

item.title: Old item that should be filtered out
item.description: Older press release outside lookback window.
